heading: Purpose
label: 9501 Purpose
text: The purpose of this chapter is to protect the interests of the United States and of the participants and their beneficiaries in Government pension plans by requiring complete disclosure of the financial condition of those plans.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)950131:68., , § 120; added , , .Sept. 12, 1950, ch. 94664 Stat. 832Pub. L. 95–595, § 192 Stat. 2541Nov. 4, 1978The words “United States” are substituted for “Nation” for clarity and consistency. The words “and certain other pension plans” are omitted as unnecessary.
